ai_role: Leading-edge foundry and advanced packaging / CoWoS capacity
tvs_tiebreaker: Tier 1 foundry chokepoint durability can justify core status even when TVS growth screens are moderate.
technical_timing_rule: Use technicals for add pacing only; fundamental/geopolitical dislocations matter more for Tier 1 infrastructure.
rationale: TSMC is central to AI chip manufacturing and advanced packaging. It is architecture-agnostic, but Taiwan/geopolitical risk and customer concentration require sizing discipline.
